title: El Wak Heat Wave
lead: El Wak is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.06. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in El Wak has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 42%, and wind speed is approximately 20.6 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe during this critical period.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety during this extreme heat wave.
